rationale: Direct support relation maps cleanly to V3 supported.
Direct contradiction relation maps cleanly to V3 contradiction_candidate.
Insufficient evidence is a distinct bucket; maps to a 3rd external-only class.
Claim is false; approximately maps to contradiction but is truth-value based, not evidence-relation based.
Mixed support; treated as insufficient for a single clean verdict.
Conflicting evidence; not a clean contradiction, bucketed as insufficient.
Cherry-picking weakly resembles mild_scope_overclaim but is NOT equivalent. Conservatively bucketed as insufficient rather than mapped to overclaim.
